reservation.source_phrase: Docent guided museum tours are by reservation only.
reservation.source_block: Docent guided museum tours are by reservation only. Walk-ins are encouraged, but docent guided tours cannot be ensured. If you must cancel, please let us know as soon as possible so that we may give the spot to someone else. Refunds will not be given to those unable to attend their booked tours. The museum is all volunteer staffed and relies on tours to fund its work.

hours.source_phrase: The Public Health Museum is open to the public on Thursdays and Saturdays 10:00 am - 2:00 pm
hours.source_block:
Hours of Operation 2026

The Public Health Museum is open to the public on Thursdays and Saturdays 10:00 am - 2:00 pm ​ Holidays Closed New Year's Day (1/1), 4th of July, and Christmas (12/24 - 12/26).
